label: Transparent Falcon motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Falcon transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated falcon wing motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: a dynamic peregrine falcon wing and sharp black eye accent, slate grey flight feathers, cream underwing bars, charcoal-black feather tips, precise aerodynamic silhouette, cliff-sky neutral highlights, fast analytical energy, crisp outer contour suitable for a transparent PNG cutout.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; wing angled in a swift upward banking arc with a small focused black falcon eye detail integrated near the shoulder; do not crop the subject.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light preserving slate grey, cream, and black-eye contrast; premium product-catalog clarity.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no full landscape, no text, no watermark, no second bird, no logo, no random brand marks, no blue/purple gradient, no cast shadow.

label: Light design-system board
prompt: Create one exact 3840x2160 wide 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Falcon" / "Falcon Wing", source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn theme. Use a fast analytics system derived from a peregrine falcon wing, slate grey flight feathers, cream barred underwing, charcoal-black feather tips, focused black eye accent, cliff limestone neutrals, pale high-sky surfaces, and aerodynamic diagonal rhythm. Include readable sections for title, motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography guidance, left navigation, top command/search bar, analytics dashboard overview, KPI cards, line chart, bar chart, sparkline strip, data table, filters, form controls, status states, cards, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switch, tabs, badges, alert, empty/loading/error states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, and CSS token samples. Use shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI, compact scan-friendly dashboard layout, slate grey primary actions, cream panels, black-eye accent for focus rings and selected states, cliff-stone borders, feather-bar data textures, restrained sky neutral background, 8px radius, and crisp labels large enough to read. Avoid watermark, fake brand names, random logos, lorem ipsum blocks, tiny illegible token tables, purple/blue gradients, neon, and unrelated saturated colors.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt: Create one exact 3840x2160 wide 16:9 comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Falcon" / "Falcon Wing", translated from the light board and the same peregrine falcon wing motif. Use deep eye-black and charcoal backgrounds, slate grey panels, cream readable foreground text, feather-cream table surfaces, cliff taupe separators, talon ochre and signal rust chart accents, black-eye focus rings, and sharp aerodynamic diagonal rhythm. Include readable sections for title, Dark Mode, motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography guidance, left navigation, top command/search bar, analytics dashboard overview, KPI cards, line chart, bar chart, sparkline strip, data table, filters, form controls, status states, cards, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switch, tabs, badges, alert, empty/loading/error states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, and CSS token samples. Preserve the light board's component language and shadcn/tweakcn compatibility. Avoid watermark, fake brand names, random logos, lorem ipsum blocks, tiny illegible token tables, purple/blue gradients, neon, and unrelated saturated colors.
